meta.pageDescription: Scope social media packages—indicative pricing only; final quotes after discovery.
meta.heroSubtitle: Wonderland cyber-lane for posts, clips, and platforms. Pick what you need (social media builds)—still not a final quote.
meta.stickyDisclaimer: Indicative pricing only. Final quotes depend on deliverables, platforms, posting cadence, and rights. Prices change; this page may lag.
meta.longDisclaimer: Totals here are not binding. Ad spend, platform fees, music licensing, and creator tools are usually billed separately unless we agree otherwise in writing.
meta.mailSubject: Social à la carte — scope from portfolio

questionnaire.title: Quick context
questionnaire.description: Helps the first call go faster.

options.label: Need filming or screen capture help

items.label: Basic — essentials
items.description: Light rhythm: a few posts/reels per month, one platform focus, simple templates.

items.label: Medium — growth lane
items.description: Multi-format edits, 2–3 platforms, weekly cadence, light strategy notes.

priceHint.basis: Clips length and revision rounds move the quote.

items.label: Full — the works (social)
items.description: Daily or near-daily presence, multi-platform, reporting, heavier creative direction.

priceHint.basis: Enterprise or paid-ads ops are separate.

items.label: You send clips — I edit & post
items.description: You record; I cut, caption, schedule.

priceHint.basis: If clips are messy, edit time goes up.

items.label: Hybrid — we co-create
items.description: Mix of your footage + graphics/templates I build.

items.label: I create most of it
items.description: Concept, scripting hooks, B-roll plans, heavier production assist.

items.label: Profiles already exist
items.description: I get access or posting workflow only.

priceHint.basis: Handoff time still billed if large.

items.label: New profiles — I set up basics
items.description: Bio, highlights, link-in-bio, starter posts.

items.label: Full brand kit on social
items.description: Avatars, banners, story templates, pinned strategy.

categories.label: Platforms
categories.description: Pick every place you want covered.

items.label: TikTok
items.description: Short vertical video rhythm.

items.label: Instagram
items.description: Feed, reels, stories as scoped.

items.label: YouTube
items.description: Long or Shorts — say which in email.

items.label: X (Twitter)
items.description: Threads, spaces hooks, newsroom pace.

items.label: Facebook
items.description: Page or group — clarify in discovery.

items.label: Threads
items.description: Text-first companion posts.

items.label: One hero platform — daily (or near-daily)
items.description: All-in on one channel; others light or none.

items.label: Several platforms — a few times a week each
items.description: Breadth over single-platform burn.

items.label: Custom / campaign spikes
items.description: Launches, drops, tour weeks — irregular intensity.

categories.label: Discoverability & social SEO
categories.description: Help profiles and posts surface in search, For You, and recommendations—without promising viral outcomes.

items.label: Profile & bio discoverability pass
items.description: Keyword-aware bios and display-name patterns (still human), CTA clarity, link-in-bio hierarchy, highlights / pinned / featured layouts that match how people actually search your niche.

priceHint.basis: Per platform bundle; heavy rebrands or many languages add time.

items.label: Title, hook & metadata for short + long video
items.description: Repeatable title and first-line patterns, description templates, chapter / key-moment notes where the platform supports it, and caption structure that helps search and suggested feeds—not keyword stuffing.

priceHint.basis: Scales with formats and whether you need locale variants.

items.label: Hashtag & topic lane map
items.description: A scoped playbook: topic pillars, hashtag clusters to rotate, banned/overused lists for your lane, and platform caps—delivered as a doc you can reuse, not daily hashtag spam as a service.

priceHint.basis: More platforms or a competitive tear-down adds scope.

items.label: Social → site measurement bridge
items.description: UTM naming conventions for campaigns and creators, link landing checks so social traffic doesn’t hit dead ends, and a short handoff so web analytics (e.g. GA4) can segment social—does not include full technical site SEO (see website à la carte).

priceHint.basis: Complex funnels or many domains need a custom quote.

items.label: DM / comment triage assist
items.description: Light community desk — not 24/7 unless scoped.

items.label: Email newsletter companion
items.description: Repurpose social beats into a simple mail rhythm.

items.label: Monthly analytics snapshot
items.description: What worked, what to try next — short deck or Loom.

items.label: Paid ads handoff (not media buy)
items.description: Creative packs + UTMs + pixel notes; you or an agency run spend.
